summary: Critical issues found across Change Proposals, Artifacts, and Keyboard Shortcuts. The cmd+c bug is a P0 blocking issue. CRICO integration is partial. Artifacts system is non-functional for file display.

issues.title: Cmd+C Opens Create Task Modal Instead of Copying
issues.description: When users press Cmd+C (or Ctrl+C), the browser's native copy functionality is blocked and the 'Create Task' modal opens instead.
issues.root_cause: In global-keyboard-shortcuts.tsx, the 'c' key shortcut handler does not check for modifier keys (metaKey/ctrlKey). When Cmd+C is pressed, e.key returns 'c', which matches the case statement, triggering preventDefault() and opening the modal.

affected_shortcuts.impact: Users cannot copy text using keyboard

issues.fix_recommendation: Add modifier key checks: if (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.altKey) return; before triggering single-key shortcuts

issues.title: Change Proposals Feature is Fully Implemented
issues.description: The Change Proposals feature is a sophisticated, production-ready AI-powered project planning system with complete database schema, API, and UI.

functionality: Intelligent auto-allocation based on team workload
Line-item approval for individual proposal items
Impact dashboard showing workload shifts and risk scores
Merge to production converts proposals into actual tasks

crico_integration.status: PARTIAL - Designed alongside CRICO but operates independently
crico_integration.gap: No direct calls from proposals code into CRICO-specific functionality

issues.title: Artifacts System Does Not Display File Contents
issues.description: The artifacts system only stores and displays metadata (URI as text) but does not show gathered or output file contents. No preview, download, or content viewing capability exists.

what_works: Artifacts are created via OpenClaw events API
Artifacts are stored in database with proper schema
List view exists with filtering by type

what_is_broken.details: Artifacts page only shows type, URI (truncated text), and timestamp - no preview
API query is .select('*, run_steps(*)') but should be .select('*, run_steps(*), artifacts(*)')
URIs are displayed as plain text, not clickable links or download buttons
Artifacts table not defined in src/lib/supabase/types.ts

findings.architecture_issue: Artifacts are designed as a reference/metadata tracker pointing to external storage (via URI), not as a file storage system. No integration with Supabase Storage.

issues.title: Artifacts System Lacks Proper Operation Logging
issues.description: No audit trail exists for artifact operations (create, view, download). Only console errors are logged.

missing_logging: Artifact creation events not logged to audit table
existing_but_separate: Ledger events system exists for general tracking

issues.title: CRICO Agents Use Static Analysis Only - No LLM Integration
issues.description: The CRICO (Cognitive Operating System) agent framework exists but performs only regex-based static analysis without calling LLMs for intelligent analysis.

findings.what_is_crico: Cognitive Operating System for Builders - monitors code quality and alignment across UI/API/DB layers

agent_orchestra.issue: All agents use static analysis only (regex, pattern matching) - no OpenAI/DeepSeek calls

gaps: No connection between CRICO agents and actual LLM calls
Pipeline and CRICO are completely siloed
Event system doesn't feed into CRICO analysis
Two different suggestion engines (crico vs client-side)

issues.title: Multiple Conflicting Keyboard Shortcut Hooks
issues.description: The codebase has 5+ different keyboard shortcut hooks with conflicting registrations, causing potential double-triggering and inconsistent behavior.

issues.title: Input Field Detection Missing in Some Components
issues.description: Several components with keyboard handlers don't check if user is typing in an input field, causing focus hijacking.

affected_components.issue: 'e' key handler doesn't check input field, focuses title instead
Ctrl+1,2,3 doesn't check if user is in input field

issues.title: Proposals Repository Table Name Mismatch
issues.description: Repository code references 'foco_proposals' but migration creates 'proposals' table (without foco_ prefix).

issues.title: Artifacts Table Missing Ownership Columns
issues.description: The artifacts table has no user_id or workspace_id columns, meaning all users see all artifacts with no filtering by workspace.

immediate_fixes: Fix KB-001: Add modifier key checks to global-keyboard-shortcuts.tsx 'c', 'd', 'g' cases
Fix ART-001: Add artifacts to runs API query (change select to include 'artifacts(*)')
Fix ART-001: Add artifacts table to supabase types
short_term_fixes: Consolidate keyboard shortcut hooks into single system
Add input field detection to card-detail-modal and view-switcher
Connect CRICO agents to LLM service (aiService.generate())
Add artifact detail view and download functionality
long_term_improvements: Integrate artifacts with Supabase Storage for actual file handling
Unify the parallel AI systems (CRICO, Pipeline, Task Actions)
